sections.markdown:
- Activity: Evening Run
- Started: 2025-07-22 18:37
- Distance: 3 km
- Moving time: 25:17
- Elapsed time: 25:29
- Elevation gain: 13.8 m
- Average heart rate: 144.3 bpm
- Max heart rate: 156 bpm
- Average watts: 149.8 W
- Average speed: 7 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `146.9 bpm`, ranging from `141.3` to `156.0 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `160.2 spm`, with a working range of `103.9` to `173.2 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `165.0 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `155.6 spm` (-9.4 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `8:32 /km` across `2.962 km` in `25:17` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `8:11 /km` and second-half pace was `8:53 /km` (+43 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `144.3 bpm` average and `156 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `147.1 bpm` in the first half and `141.0 bpm` in the second (-6.1 bpm), which came down late rather than drifting upward.

- Moving time was `25:17` out of `25:29` elapsed (99.2%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `21` stop segments and `11.1%` stationary samples, so the route included repeated interruptions.

- Strava logged about `24.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `2.8 m` and `10.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `17.0 m` in the first half and `7.2 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
